# clang trunk (x86): assertion failed in cast<PointerType> when adding interrupt attributes to UINTR handler with array (non-pointer) frame parameter

**Author:** Theaamadu
**URL:** https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/173604
**Status:** Closed
**Labels:** duplicate, clang:codegen, crash, generated by fuzzer
**Closed Date:** 2025-12-28T05:56:33Z

## Body

## Compiler Explorer: https://godbolt.org/z/YYnzxcbdq

- clang start crashing on `Trunk`
- generated by fuzzer


## Code
```c
#include <x86gprintrin.h>

typedef unsigned int uword_t __attribute__((mode(__word__)));

void __attribute__((target("general-regs-only"), interrupt))
UINTR_handler(struct __uintr_frame p[10], uword_t uirrv) {}
```

## Code
```c
#include &lt;x86gprintrin.h&gt;

typedef unsigned int uword_t __attribute__((mode(__word__)));

void __attribute__((target("general-regs-only"), interrupt))
UINTR_handler(struct __uintr_frame p[10], uword_t uirrv) {}
```
</details>


---

### Comment 2 - keinflue

Fails since Clang 3.9 with an assertion, since Clang 12 with the same assertion as reported: https://godbolt.org/z/1P3eo1E7o

Reduces to (https://godbolt.org/z/xz4YjETvG)
```cpp
void __attribute__((interrupt)) f(struct A[]) {}
```

There is no assertion before Clang 12 if a complete type instead of `struct A` is chosen, even if it is still incorrect for `__attribute__((interrupt))`. The assertion since Clang 12 seems to occur for any type that has array form (before function parameter adjustments): https://godbolt.org/z/qnM4rbzG8

The same occurs with function types as parameter, see possible duplicate https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/96018. Both variants have also been reported in https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/50170.




---
